{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032012142752F35B492EB0CE19FB28"}"},"total":263},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7422503425877705534","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好的一本小說，基本上沒有雷點，主角我真的很好，好久沒看一本小說看的很舒服了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1728189976,"group_id":"7396243851486186520","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"萝莉YYDS","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5E9OQurT4jPfTRxf3UoWtk=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ea424f6913a4441d8abcc434815dda9c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531591&x-signature=bW0%2B4X4rgTTQtNYrAeAxrn2cQo4%3D","user_id":"351451285292958","user_name":"﻿Garne⁠⁢t"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"351451285292958","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7396243851486186520","book_info":{"abstract":"【多女主】【不重生】【无系统】【非爽文】【轻小说】
心之夏私立学院，一所培养【才能】的学校，据说从那里成功毕业的学生毫无例外都能成为社会上各领域的精英。
拥有“易遭麻烦”体质的白源，在校长的安排下转学到这所特殊的学校。画画，弹琴，分析，领导……这里的学生无一不是世界级的天之骄子，而他将成为全校唯一的“无才能者”，隐藏身份直到顺利毕业。
什么？你们都是天才美少女，那我们之间的相处一定很融洽吧。
诶？突然靠的那么近干什么，你们的表情好奇怪……
说好的天才少女，怎么你们全是变态？说好的“无才能者”，为什么我还得参加所谓的“才能考试”？
如何在隐藏身份的同时，解开少女们一个又一个的心结。白源的校园生活，才刚刚开始。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2od02397736ba722e896494c7078b8c5a9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"淋浴煮地瓜","author_id":"","book_id":"7396243851486186520","book_name":"喜欢我的女孩总不能全是变态吧？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8e0f0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3109人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":858,"name":"轻小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=858&name=轻小说&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7396243880603025944","read_count":"3109","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"474534"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.0","serial_count":"221","tags":"都市日常,都市,多女主,轻小说","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4d112cca9959e825b1286a0db7153c57~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779164067&x-signature=WX2NzoaonP7HbBG8qlQ8H%2FP4g3o%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1781651567815293","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"171"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032012142752F35B492EB0CE19FB28"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":18714,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":10441},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1728191737,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"use
